## completeTasksDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `complete-batch` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `complete-batch` and the MCP tool `tasks_complete_batch`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
completeTasksDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskIds: string[];
}, BatchResult<BatchCompleteItem>, z.ZodObject<{
    taskIds: z.ZodArray<z.ZodString, "many">;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskIds: string[];
}, {
    taskIds: string[];
}>>
```
